data.title: REI celebrates Member Month with fresh rewards, new gear and $200 million in Co-op Member Rewards
data.description: In Seattle on March 6, 2026, REI is observing Member Month this March, offering exclusive deals, product releases, and more to its 25 million co-op members. During this limited-time event, members can access special rewards and new gear arrivals, enhancing the value of their membership.

data.title: Kira Works with Anthropic to Use AI to Generate Complete Courses and Power Precise Skills Measurement for Personalized Learning
data.description: Kira, a company specializing in AI-native Operating System for Education, and Anthropic, an AI safety company behind Claude, have partnered to revolutionize the utilization of AI in education. This integration aims to establish a groundbreaking approach in developing courses, evaluating skills, and implementing tailored interventions in K–12, higher education, and workforce training. By incorporating Claude into Kira’s platform, the collaboration enables the creation of entire courses, like the 9th Grade Biology curriculum, setting a new industry standard for AI integration in educational technology.

data.title: PerfectQuote and Sana Benefits Announce Partnership to Market Sana Level-Funded Medical Plans through PerfectQuote's Benefits Quoting Platform
data.description: Austin, TX - On March 6, 2026, PerfectQuote, Inc. revealed a fresh collaboration with Sana Benefits, Inc. ("Sana"). This partnership aims to grant PerfectQuote customers direct entry to Sana's assortment of group health digital quotes and distribution services. PerfectQuote, Inc. is the prominent platform for group health digital quoting and distribution.

data.title: Kettering University Ranked #1 for Career Outcomes as Its Century-Old Co-op Model Gains New Relevance
data.description: In a recent report, Kettering University in Flint, Michigan, has secured the top spot among 780 undergraduate institutions for career outcomes as per the 2025 Launchpad Rankings. This achievement places Kettering University ahead of prestigious Ivy League schools, Stanford, and Duke. The university's president, Dr. Robert K. McMahan, credits this distinction to the institution's dedication to providing excellent career outcomes for its students.
